purpose: Track generated/python runtime and operation-executor Python files whose location alone could be mistaken for generated ownership.
completion_rule: The Python CLI completion gate may reach full-generated-cli-complete only when every entry is rendered-by-command-generation, blocking_full_completion is false for every entry, and command-generation render_outputs produces the same paths.

entries.source_of_truth: src/agentic_workspace/contracts/command_package_ir.json python_runtime_binding.render_runtime_module plus workspace operation IR resources and explicit runtime primitive handler bindings
entries.why_blocking: not blocking; this runtime handler map is mechanically rendered from command-package binding metadata while product-specific live workspace behavior is behind explicit runtime primitive bindings
entries.required_resolution: Keep generated freshness proof covering this file and continue migrating generic deterministic behavior from workspace runtime primitives into codegen-owned primitives.
